prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约4117→4656→3662→4863→6313名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年后移约1450名，为近五年最大降幅，基准位次约6313 名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021年139人、2022年121人、2023年120人、2024年125人、2025年118人，2026年大幅扩招至172人，较2025年增加54人 （增幅约45.8%），扩招力度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第34名，近年排名稳定 在第33–34位，属国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因实验室爆炸事件引发关注；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史 投档异常记录中未见重庆大学明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程获评A+，机械工程、环境科学与工程、电气工程、风景园林学获评A-，工科实力突出 ，与招生专业中的工科试验班（电气信息类、工程能源类等）高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2024–2026年持续高热推 荐，社会报考热度高；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约29.7万）小幅增加，物理类考生估算约20.8万，竞争基数略有上升；重庆大学位于重庆市，与贵州省相邻，地理距离近、交通便利，对贵州考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生规模较大（2026年物理类 172人），属跨省招生重点省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+45.8%）对竞争的缓解作用、学校高层次的吸引力、热门工科专 业持续高热带来的报考热度，以及贵州考生总数小幅增加等因素，扩招效应占主导但被专业热度和考生增长部分抵消，预计2026年最低位次，预测最低位次约7847名，区间7347–8347名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4117 → 4656 → 3662 → 4863 → 6313, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 1450 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 6313. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 139 in 2021, 121 in 2022, 120 in 2023, 125 in 2024, and 118 in 2025. In 2026, it significantly expanded to 172 students, an increase of 54 students (approximately 45.8%) compared to 2025, a notable expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 34th on the main list, with stable rankings between 33rd and 34th in recent years, placing it among the top domestic universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to attention from a laboratory explosion incident. Its Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. No significant gaps in historical admission anomalies have been observed for Chongqing University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering was rated A+, Mechanical Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Landscape Architecture were rated A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, closely related to the engineering experimental classes (Electrical and Information, Engineering and Energy, etc.) in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,000 in 2025 (Physics Category + History Category). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 208,000, with a slight rise in the competitive base. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing City, adjacent to Guizhou Province, with close geographical distance and convenient transportation, offering strong regional appeal to Guizhou candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Guizhou (172 students in Physics Category in 2026), making it a key province for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in rankings in 2025, the alleviation of competition from the substantial enrollment expansion in 2026 (+45.8%), the high-level appeal of the university, the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors driving application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in the total number of Guizhou candidates, the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by major popularity and candidate growth. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 7847, with a range of 7347 to 8347.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Economics and Management)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7347–8347, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Information, High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing), with Tier 1 Excellence Program/Electrical Engineering/Computer Science as reach options (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 Civil Engineering and Architecture, Economics and Management, and Environmental-Chemical Health as safety options. After the expansion, admission opportunities increase, but competition for popular engineering majors remains intense, so it is advisable to reasonably arrange a gradient.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类（含文科）最低位次分别为约648→609→623→615→862名，2021–2024年基本稳定在600–650名区间，2025年大幅后移至862名（后移约247名）， 波动明显；该校在贵州省历史类招生计划2021年12人、2022年10人、2023年9人、2024年8人、2025年8人，2026年计划仍为8人，连续三年持平，无扩缩招 变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第34名，属国内顶尖高校；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室 爆炸事件），但主要影响理工科报考心理；抖音热度排名第23位（较热）；历史投档异常中未见重庆大学文科/历史类断档记录；重庆大学优势学科以工科为主 ，历史类招生专业（汉语言文学、法学新闻类）对应学科评估未单独评级，但学校整体层次高，对文科考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言/中文等文科 专业2024–2026年社会热度为推荐级别，报考热度平稳；贵州省历史类考生2024年约9.9万、2025年约9.0万，2026年估算约9.1万（按总考生29.9万及近年历史类占比约30.3%推算 ），考生规模基本稳定；重庆大学位于重庆，与贵州相邻，交通便利，对贵州文科考生有较强地域吸引力；历史类招生计 划虽少但稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、招生计划连续三年持平、考生规模基本稳定、文科专业热度平稳等因素，预计2026年位次在2025年862名基础 上小幅后移，预测最低位次约882名，区间750–1014名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 648 → 609 → 623 → 615 → 862, basically stable in the 600–650 range from 2021 to 2024, but significantly dropped to 862 in 2025 (a drop of about 247 places), showing clear fluctuation; the enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou's History Category was 12 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and still 8 in 2026, unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 34th in the 2026 main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, belonging to top domestic universities; its reputation in 2026 is slightly negative (laboratory explosion incident), but mainly affects the psychology of science and engineering applicants; Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot); no gaps in history/liberal arts admissions for Chongqing University have been recorded; its advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Journalism) have not been individually rated in discipline evaluations, but the overall high level of the university still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature have been at a recommended level of social popularity from 2024 to 2026, with stable application enthusiasm; the number of History Category candidates in Guizhou was about 99,000 in 2024, about 90,000 in 2025, and estimated at about 91,000 in 2026 (based on total candidates of 299,000 and recent History Category proportion of about 30.3%), with basically stable candidate scale; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Guizhou, with convenient transportation, strongly attracting Guizhou liberal arts candidates; the History Category enrollment plan is small but stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for three consecutive years, the basically stable candidate scale, and the stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly drop further from the 2025 ranking of 862, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 882, and a range of 750–1014.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only two enrollment majors in History Category. Within the predicted ranking range of 750–1014, it is recommended to use Law and Journalism as a reach (referencing 2025 ranking 862) and Chinese Language and Literature Boya Class as a safe choice (referencing 2025 ranking 791).
